form.formComment: Racing well recently. At the latest run made ground from midfield; 2nd of 8 at Penn National on March 19 over 1207m, 0.5 len behind Whiskey Alley with 56kg at $2.50. The run before that 2nd in a small field at Penn National on February 27 over 1106m, 5 len behind Borz carrying 56kg at $18.30. Went close last time. Leading player again.

form.formComment: Returns from a 35-day let-up. Last start ran last in a small field at this track on March 6 over 1408m, 29 len behind I'm Not Catty with 55.5kg at $23.70.
